notes: Single event in chunk: Q4 FY2023 earnings call transcript (2024-02-21), part 1/1; no fiscal_kpis in this chunk.

Skipped as vague/duplicative/non-causal (12): G&A guidance, depreciation guidance, lease termination expense (folded into asset_impairment evidence), FRC acquisition-related expenses, medical insurance expense lapping, delivery/OLO promotions (vendor label), restaurant relocations, balance-sheet liquidity/debt levels, generic consumer purchasing behavior, landlord/development opening delays (state-noun; folded into new_unit_development), North Italia restaurant-level margin (mechanism covered by restaurant_level_margin), staffing levels (covered by employee_retention/labor_productivity).

Used same_store_sales (not a brand-prefixed form) for flagship comps since Cheesecake Factory is also the company legal name (banned in names); North Italia / Flower Child brand metrics kept as own drivers per ontology R9.
All 29 evidence quotes verified verbatim against source content via substring check.
